holdings.n: Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund

holdings.infoBox: FDCF is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.32%, Alphabet at 8.64%, Meta Platforms at 5.77%, Arista Networks at 5.68%, and NVIDIA at 5.64%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Disruptive Communications ETF (FDCF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in companies tied with disruptive technologies in communications services. The fund invests in securities of domestic and foreign issuers FDCF was launched on Apr 16, 2020 and is issued by Fidelity.
